title: Telegram text task
goal: Verify that the Telegram gateway can receive a text prompt, show progress, and return a grounded response.
prompt: Read the files in the current workspace and tell me what kind of project this is.
prerequisites: Telegram bot token exported in the same shell as the gateway
Gateway started with `pnpm run dev -- gateway start --telegram`
steps: Send the suggested prompt to the Telegram bot.
Capture the final reply and any gateway terminal output.
assertions: One evolving progress message appears instead of message spam.
Final reply is grounded in the repo contents.
Gateway stays healthy throughout the turn.
